name: Sir Kaelen
description: The last guardian of the White Sun. His sword knows no fear.

name: Grak
description: He's not very smart, but his mace is very heavy.

name: Lyra
description: Invokes a rain of astral arrows that pierce through time.

name: Tenebris
description: Born from the shadows of the abyss. Where he walks, light dies.

name: Xal'Thun the Devourer
description: A cosmic entity that consumes entire realities.

name: Ether Sword
description: Ignores the enemy's physical defense.

name: Scared Villager
description: He just wanted to get some bread.

name: Obsidian Dragon
description: His breath is liquid lava that scorches the soul.

name: Ancestral Healing
description: Restores lost vitality in combat.

name: Steam Golem
description: A mechanical marvel that never tires.

name: Mana Blast
description: Releases pure energy that damages all enemies.

name: Wandering Mage
description: Knows a few tricks, but prefers not to use them.

name: Chalice of Life
description: Grants immortality in exchange for a sacrifice.

name: Wolf of Fenrir
description: Hunts in packs and never leaves a trace.

name: Broken Shield
description: Barely serves to cover from the wind.

name: Dream Invoker
description: Materializes your deepest nightmares.

name: Sandstorm
description: Blinds opponents for one turn.

name: The Archivist
description: Possesses the knowledge of all eras.

name: Anvil of Destiny
description: Forges legendary weapons in the heat of battle.

name: Sewer Rat
description: Small, but its bite infects.

name: Lord of Specters
description: Commands an army of grieving souls.

name: Ice Arrow
description: Freezes the target instantaneously.

name: Guardian Centaur
description: Protects the forbidden forests with his life.

name: Spellbook
description: Reduces the cost of all spells by 1.

name: Call of Thunder
description: Strikes with the force of a thousand lightning bolts.

name: Court Spy
description: Reveals the opponent's hand.

name: Nature's Sprout
description: Grows roots that trap the enemy.

name: Rusty Knife
description: Causes tetanus if you're lucky.

name: Valkyrie of Valhalla
description: Chooses who lives and who dies in the field.

name: Fury Potion
description: Increases attack but reduces defense.

name: Skeleton Warrior
description: Has no skin, but has attitude.

name: Soul Mirror
description: Copies the last card played by the opponent.

name: War Cry
description: Motivates all your allied creatures.

name: Swamp Beast
description: Hides in the mud waiting for its prey.

name: Lucky Amulet
description: Increases critical hit probability.

name: Priestess of the Moon
description: Her prayers calm even the fiercest beasts.

name: Rain of Fire
description: Leaves no stone unturned.

name: Shadow Thief
description: Steals a card from the opponent's hand.

name: Ring of Power
description: One ring to rule them all.

name: Hungry Zombie
description: Just wants a fresh brain.

name: Earth Titan
description: A mountain that decided to walk.

name: Teleport
description: Moves a creature to the reserve.

name: Elven Bow
description: Allows attacking from a distance.

name: River Naiad
description: Her song lures sailors to their doom.

name: Dark Sacrifice
description: Destroys an ally to summon a demon.

name: Worg Pup
description: Looks cute, until it bites.

name: Tower Shield
description: A solid rock defense.

name: Phoenix Reborn
description: Returns to play after being destroyed.

name: Bear Trap
description: A headache for explorers.

name: Crazed Berserker
description: Attacks anyone, friend or foe.

name: Curse of Oblivion
description: The opponent forgets their last two moves.

name: Traveling Bard
description: Improves troop morale with his lute.

name: Invisibility Cloak
description: The creature cannot be attacked next turn.

name: Lernean Hydra
description: Cut off one head and two more will grow.

name: Solar Flare
description: Burns the retinas of the undead.

name: Orc Recruit
description: Cannon fodder for the horde.

name: Staff of Wisdom
description: Increases damage of all spells.

name: Seductive Succubus
description: Takes control of an enemy creature.

name: Mirage
description: Creates a fake copy of an ally.

name: Battle Axe
description: A classic weapon for a classic warrior.

name: Lich King
description: Death is only the beginning of his reign.

name: Stone Wall
description: Temporarily blocks the opponent's path.

name: Mischievous Sprite
description: Likes stealing coins and socks.

name: Eternal Hourglass
description: Stops time for a full turn.

name: Dragon Summoning
description: Brings a dragon from the astral plane.

name: Tribal Shaman
description: Speaks with the spirits of his ancestors.

name: Cobra Venom
description: Inflicts continuous damage for three turns.

name: Rusty Armor
description: Smells bad, but protects a little.

name: Petrifying Medusa
description: A single glance is enough to turn you into stone.

name: Shadow Veil
description: Hides your entire team for one turn.

name: Royal Griffin
description: The preferred mount of kings.

name: Golden Statue
description: Generates extra gold each turn.

name: Wild Manticore
description: A lethal mix of lion, eagle, and scorpion.

name: Arctic Blizzard
description: Damages and freezes all enemies.

name: Gnome Inventor
description: His inventions explode 50% of the time.

name: Crystal Ball
description: Allows seeing the next three cards of the deck.

name: Deep Sea Kraken
description: Sinks entire ships with a single tentacle.

name: Earthquake
description: Destroys all artifacts in play.

name: Stalking Shadow
description: Attacks the opponent directly.

name: Watcher's Eye
description: Prevents the opponent from using invisibility.

name: Orc Fury
description: Increases an orc's attack for one turn.

name: Old Forest Ent
description: Don't rush, the forest has its time.

name: Poison Dagger
description: Applies poison when attacking.

name: Dew Fairy
description: Her magic dust makes you sneeze.

name: Dimensional Portal
description: Exchanges a creature for another of higher cost.

name: Iron Knight
description: Faithful, strong, and a little rusty.

name: Pan Flute
description: Puts an enemy creature to sleep.

name: Lord of Flames
description: Fire is his servant and his crown.

name: Mirror Shield
description: Reflects spell damage to the opponent.

name: Risen Mummy
description: Has been sleeping for a thousand years.

name: Purifying Ray
description: Removes all curses from an ally.

name: Living Statue
description: Activates only when someone touches it.

name: Pandora's Box
description: Random effect: can save you or destroy you.

name: Singing Mermaid
description: Don't listen to her voice or you'll be lost.

name: Tsunami
description: Clears the entire battlefield.

name: Watcher Gargoyle
description: Stone by day, hunter by night.

name: Shadow Dagger
description: A precise strike in the dark.

name: Time Mage
description: Manipulates the past to change the future.

name: Total Eclipse
description: Reduces visibility and attack for everyone.

name: The Nexus
description: The origin of everything. Allows you to win the game if you survive three turns.
